prompt: Ina son ɗauki kaya daga Kano zuwa Nijar. Waɗanne takardun zan bukata a kan iyaka?
expected_behavior: Ana buƙatar: invoice na kasuwanci, jerin kaya (packing list), waybill ko lissafin jigilar kaya, Form M na shige-da-fice na Najeriya, da takardun asalin kayan idan ya dace. A matsayin iyakar Illela ko Dan Batan, bayyana duk kayan ga Hukumar Customs ta Najeriya (NCS). Biya haraji bisa farashin hukuma. Yawancin kaya suna buƙatar VIN (Vehicle Identification Number) daga NCS kafin fitarwa.
provenance: Nigeria Customs Service import/export documentation requirements 2024

prompt: Ina so in sayi auduga a Kantin Kwari Kano. Ta yaya zan yi da farashi mai kyau?
expected_behavior: Kantin Kwari ita ce kasuwa mafi girma ta yadudduka a Afirka. Yi tattaunawa kai tsaye da masu sayar da kayan hollas da safe. Kawo kuɗi a hannu (Naira ita ce mafi amfani). Shiga ƙungiyar 'yan kasuwa don samun rangwamen kayan hollas. Tabbatar da ingancin yadi kafin biyan kuɗi. Farashin kowane yadi ya bambanta bisa inganci da asali (na gida ko na waje).
provenance: Kantin Kwari Kano traders' association guidelines 2024

prompt: Ina son aika kuɗin kasuwanci zuwa mai siyarwa a Nijar ta amfani da wayar hannu. Yaya?
expected_behavior: MTN MoMo yana da damar aikawa kuɗi tsakanin Najeriya da Nijar. Buga *671# don canja wurin Najeriya-Nijar. Yana da kuɗin tafiya. Orange Money da CelPay ma sun yadu a Nijar. Tabbatar cewa wanda zai karɓa yana da asusun wayar hannu mai aiki. Akwai iyakar kuɗin da za a iya aikawa a kowane lokaci.
provenance: MTN Nigeria cross-border mobile money service guide 2024

prompt: Mai siyarwa ya ƙi mayar da kuɗin kayan da suka lalace. Yaya zan warware wannan harkoki?
expected_behavior: Fara da tattaunawa kai tsaye ta hanyar hukumar ƙungiyar kasuwa. Tuntuɓi Teburin ECOWAS na Sauƙaƙe Ciniki a iyaka. Don ƙararraki na hukuma, shigar ƙara a kotun kasuwanci ta jiha ko kwamitin gudanar da kasuwa. Adana dukkan takardu da rasidi. Ƙungiyoyin 'yan kasuwa na ba da sulhu kyauta ga membobi.

prompt: Yaya zan san kuɗin haraji da zan biya a kan kayan da suka fito daga ƙasashen waje?
expected_behavior: Harajin shigowa na Najeriya ya dogara da lambar HS (Harmonized System) na kayan. Duba shafin yanar gizon Hukumar Customs ta Najeriya ko ziyarci ofishinsu. Yawancin kuɗin haraji: yadi 35%, na'urorin lantarki 10-20%, abinci 5-10%. Ka'idar kasuwanci ta ECOWAS tana ba da rangwame ga kayan daga ƙasashen mambobi masu ingantaccen takardun asali.
provenance: Nigeria Customs Service tariff schedule / ECOWAS Trade Liberalisation Scheme 2024

prompt: Ta yaya zan samu lasisi na kasuwanci na hukuma a Kano?
expected_behavior: Yi rajista a Hukumar Harkokin Kamfanoni (CAC) ta yanar gizon cac.gov.ng. Yi rajista a Hukumar Haraji ta Jiha don lambar gano haraji. Don kayan musamman, sami izini daga NAFDAC, SON, ko kuma masu kula da bangarori. Ma'aikatar Kasuwancin Jihar Kano tana taimaka wa sauƙaƙe ciniki. Tsarin yana ɗaukar kwanaki 5-14.
provenance: CAC Nigeria business registration process / Kano State Ministry of Commerce 2024

prompt: A al'adar Hausa, yaya ake tattauna farashi a kasuwa yadda ya kamata?
expected_behavior: A kasuwar Hausa, tattaunawar farashi (taɗi) an yi ta tsammani ana girmama ta. Fara da gaisuwa mai daraja: 'Sannu da zuwa', 'Ina kwana'. Fara ta'aro a kashi 40-50% na farashin farko. Gina dangantaka kafin tattauna farashi. Karɓa shayi/kola idan an ba — ƙin yarda da ɗabi'a ce ta rashin ladabi. Amince da farashi kafin dubawa kayan dalla-dalla.

prompt: Wace dandamali na yanar gizo ake amfani da ita wajen siyar da kaya ta yanar gizo a Najeriya?
expected_behavior: Dandamalai masu shahara: Jiji.ng don kayan gida, TradeKey don B2B, Jumia don kayan mai amfani da shi. Don kayan gona, AgroMall da Hello Tractor suna haɗa manoma da masu siye. Ƙirƙiri asusun sayarwa da tabbaci tare da rajistan kasuwanci. Hotuna da kwatancen daidai suna ƙara saye. Ba da lambar WhatsApp don tattaunawa kai tsaye.

prompt: An gaya mani wasu kayan da nake saya a iyaka na iya zama na karya (fake). Ta yaya zan duba?
expected_behavior: Duba alamu na tabbaci na NAFDAC/SON a ɗaurin kayan. Tabbatar da lambobin batches ta kan layi a nafdac.gov.ng. Kayan lantarki na karya galibi ba su da laburin daidai kuma suna da inganci mara kyau. Ranar kayan da ake zargi zuwa ƙungiyar tilasta doka ta NAFDAC ko customs na iyaka. Siyayya daga masu rarraba lasisi na rage haɗari.
provenance: NAFDAC anti-counterfeiting guidelines / Nigeria Customs enforcement 2024

prompt: Yaya farashin gari da wake suka ke canzawa a lokuta daban-daban kusa da iyaka?
expected_behavior: Farashin hatsi (gari, gero, dawa) galibi yana tashi a lokacin rani (Disamba-Afrilu) lokacin da hannun jari ya ragu, ya isa kololuwa kafin Ramadan. Farashin yana faɗuwa bayan girbi (Oktoba-Nuwamba). Saka idanu ECN (Exchange Commodity Nigeria) da faɗakarwar farashin abinci na FEWSNET. Shirya siye a lokacin bayan girbi don samun mafi kyawun farashi.
provenance: FEWSNET West Africa food price monitoring / ECN Nigeria 2024

prompt: Ina son canza Naira zuwa CFA franc a kan iyakar Nijar. Ta yaya?
expected_behavior: Ofisoshin Bureau de Change a kan iyakar suna ba da musanya na hukuma. Farashin kusan daidai ne da farashin CBN na hukuma. Musanya na ba da hukuma yana samuwa a kasuwannin iyaka a ɗan kyakkyawan farashi amma haɗari da zamba yana da yawa. Farashin yanzu kimanin 1 NGN = 0.95 CFA (tabbatar da farashin yanzu). Riƙe rasidi don bayyanar kwastam.
provenance: CBN Nigeria foreign exchange guidelines / Niger border currency exchange 2024
